footer.title: Beautyhub
footer.description: Your trusted platform to discover and connect with the best beauty professionals across Africa. Find top-rated salons, nail artists, and beauty specialists near you.

authLayout.heading: Grow Your Beauty Business
authLayout.description: Join Cameroon's premier beauty platform and connect with thousands of potential customers.

testimonial.text: "Beautyhub helped me double my clientele in 3 months!"
testimonial.author: - Marie, Salon Elegance Douala

booking.title: Book Appointment
booking.homeNote: Note: Home services may include additional fees. The salon will confirm details in the chat.
booking.afterBooking: After you book, you'll be able to chat directly with the salon to confirm details and discuss any special requests.

about.heroSubtitle: Connecting beauty professionals and clients across Africa with trust and technology.
about.missionText1: Our mission is to empower beauty entrepreneurs by providing a robust platform to showcase their talents, manage their business, and connect with a wider audience. We aim to simplify the process for clients to discover, book, and review beauty services, ensuring a seamless and trustworthy experience for everyone.
about.missionText2: We believe in the power of community and strive to build a supportive ecosystem where beauty professionals can thrive and clients can find the perfect match for their needs.
about.ctaText: Whether you're looking for your next beauty treatment or want to grow your salon business, Beautyhub is here for you.

beautyTips.title: Beauty Tips & Trends
beautyTips.subtitle: Discover the rich beauty traditions of Cameroon, from ancient natural remedies to modern styling techniques that celebrate our diverse cultural heritage.

compare.title: Compare Salons
compare.subtitle: See how your top choices stack up side-by-side.
compare.addToCompare: Add salons to your compare list to see them here.

subscriptions.heroTitle: Grow Your Beauty Business with Beautyhub
subscriptions.heroDesc: Choose the perfect plan for your salon and start attracting more customers today.
subscriptions.pricingDesc: Start with any plan and upgrade anytime as your business grows.
subscriptions.freeCoupon: Free coupon code for new users:
subscriptions.fetchError: Failed to load subscriptions. The server might be unavailable.
subscriptions.noPlansDesc: There are currently no subscription plans. Contact an admin to add one
subscriptions.feature1Desc: Complete profile, services, and appointment management in one place.
subscriptions.feature2Desc: Track bookings, customer behavior, and grow your business with data.
subscriptions.feature3Desc: Higher visibility means more local customers finding your business.
subscriptions.feature4Desc: Communicate directly with customers and build relationships.
subscriptions.faq1Question: Can I change my plan later?
subscriptions.faq1Answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
subscriptions.faq2Question: Do you offer a free trial?
subscriptions.faq2Answer: Yes, new salon owners get a 7-day free trial to explore all features before committing.
subscriptions.faq3Question: What payment methods do you accept?
subscriptions.faq3Answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and local payment methods like MTN MoMo and Orange Money.

recovery.title: Account Recovery
recovery.subtitle: Verify your identity to reset password.

offerPage.intro: Are you into skincare or beauty business and want to get more customers online? We will help you create a professional profile that will act as your website, catalog, and price list, so customers can see your services and contact you easily. We will do this for just $5. After that, we will also help you promote your business for FREE for one month. Click the link below to chat with us on WhatsApp and get started now!
offerPage.cardTitle: Your professional profile acts as your
offerPage.effortDesc: We do all the tech work.

hero.title: Grow Your Beauty Business
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of salon owners using Beautyhub to attract more customers, manage appointments, and scale faster.

card1.title: Easy Management
card1.text: Manage your salon profile, services and appointments all in one place.

card2.title: More Bookings
card2.text: Get discovered by thousands of beauty-seeking customers in your area.

card3.title: Business Analytics
card3.text: Track bookings, earnings and insights to grow smarter.

card4.title: Direct Communication
card4.text: Chat with customers, build relationships and offer better service.

q1.question: Do I need a subscription to get started?
q1.answer: No, you can create an account and set up your salon profile for free. You only pay when you want premium features.

q2.question: Can I change my plan later?
q2.answer: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade or cancel your subscription anytime.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: We support cards & local payments like MTN MoMo and Orange Money.
